name: live-studio
description: Live Studio — modular super-extension for Ableton Live: 130 modules, 356 tools, 84 quick-actions, AI copilot and a Cmd-K command palette in a single tabbed webview.

scripts.package: tsx build.ts && find . -name '.DS_Store' -not -path './node_modules/*' -delete; rm -f live-studio.ablx && find manifest.json dist -type f -not -name '.DS_Store' -not -name '*.map' -print0 | xargs -0 zip -q -X live-studio.ablx && python3 scripts/verify-ablx.py
